display.purpose: Big stat values and key figures on cards; Bricolage Grotesque, tabular numerals.

headline.purpose: Page titles in the sticky header.

label.purpose: Uppercase field labels, stat captions, table headers; 0.8px tracking.

shadows.name: stat-rest
shadows.purpose: Lighter float for compact stat tiles.

shadows.name: stat-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive lift on stat tiles, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: button-primary
shadows.purpose: Warm amber cast + inner top highlight on primary buttons — the only colored shadow.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft amber ring on focused inputs.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Default fast easing for hover/focus state changes.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default action button: white with amber-on-hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; min-height:42px; padding:11px 20px; border-radius:12px; border:1.5px solid #d3dae4; background:#fff; color:#0e1526; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.06); transition:border-color .18s, background .18s, color .18s, transform .18s, box-shadow .18s; } .ds-btn:hover { border-color:#d97706; background:#fffaf2; color:#d97706; transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(217,119,6,.16); } .ds-btn:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(.99); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action: amber gradient with warm shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-p { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; min-height:42px; padding:11px 20px; border-radius:12px; border:1.5px solid #b45309; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706 55%,#b45309); color:#fff; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(217,119,6,.38), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.32); transition:background .18s, box-shadow .18s, transform .18s; } .ds-btn-p:hover { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#b45309 60%,#92400e); border-color:#92400e; box-shadow:0 9px 24px rgba(217,119,6,.44), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.2); transform:translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Labeled field with amber focus glow.
components.css: .ds-fi { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; } .ds-fi span { font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.8px; color:#4a556b; font-weight:600; } .ds-fi input { padding:11px 14px; min-height:42px; border-radius:11px; border:1.5px solid #d3dae4; background:#fbfcfe; color:#0e1526; font-family:inherit; font-size:13px; outline:none; transition:border-color .18s, box-shadow .18s, background .18s; } .ds-fi input:hover { border-color:#b6c0cf; } .ds-fi input:focus { border-color:#d97706; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(217,119,6,.12); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Floating white container with soft layered shadow.
components.html:
Deckungsbeitrag

Der Rohgewinn nach Amazon-Gebühren und Wareneinsatz.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e6eaf1; border-radius:18px; padding:22px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.04), 0 14px 36px -12px rgba(15,23,42,.09); font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; margin:0 0 16px; color:#0e1526; } .ds-card-body { font-size:14px; line-height:1.6; color:#4a556b; }

components.name: Stat Tile
components.description: Compact metric tile with tabular figure; lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-stat { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; min-width:140px; padding:14px 20px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e6eaf1; border-radius:16px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.04), 0 8px 22px -8px rgba(15,23,42,.08); transition:transform .18s, box-shadow .18s, border-color .18s; } .ds-stat:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); border-color:#d8dee8; box-shadow:0 12px 28px -8px rgba(15,23,42,.12); } .ds-stat .sl { font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; color:#4a556b; font-weight:600; } .ds-stat .sv { font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque','DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.5px; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:#0e1526; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar rail item, active (amber) state shown.
components.css: .ds-rail { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:3px; padding:14px 12px; width:232px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0c1322 0%,#111a2e 55%,#152138 100%); } .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; width:100%; padding:9px 12px; border:none; border-radius:12px; background:none; color:#a7b1cd; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; text-align:left; cursor:pointer; transition:background .18s, color .18s; } .ds-nav .ico { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:30px; height:30px; font-size:16px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.06); border-radius:10px; } .ds-nav:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.06); color:#f4f6ff; } .ds-nav.active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(245,158,11,.26),rgba(217,119,6,.08)); color:#fcb64a; font-weight:700; box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(245,158,11,.32), 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.28); } .ds-nav.active .ico { background:rgba(245,158,11,.20); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Category/status pill on a tint of its own hue.
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-block; padding:4px 11px; border-radius:16px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; white-space:nowrap; } .ds-badge-research { background:rgba(109,40,217,.09); color:#6d28d9; }

narrative.overview: SellerHub is a calm, warm-lit control room for German Amazon sellers. A dark navy navigation rail runs down the left like an instrument housing, lit from within by a single amber glow; to its right sits a bright, airy workspace where every readout, table, and form earns its place. The system's job is to turn a wall of marketplace data into a confident decision, so the interface stays legible and unhurried: generous rounding, soft layered shadows that lift on interaction, and one warm accent that appears exactly where attention should go. The palette is deliberately restrained on the surface so that numbers, not chrome, carry the screen. Typography pairs a confident display grotesque (Bricolage) for headlines and figures against a clean humanist sans (DM Sans) for everything else. It rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, the cluttered enterprise tool, the playful consumer app, and the cheap hustle/dropship tool.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy rail + bright workspace; amber is the only voice of emphasis
Soft, layered shadows that lift on hover — depth as a response to state, never decoration
Bricolage Grotesque for display/figures, DM Sans for body; tabular numerals for money
Warm amber focus glow (0 0 0 4px rgba(217,119,6,.12)), never a hard black outline
Generous rounding (10–18px) and calm, legible density

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber is the only accent used for emphasis and action. If two things on a screen are both amber, one of them is wrong. Status hues carry data meaning, never UI emphasis.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Colored text sits on a tint of its own hue, never gray text on a saturated background. Washed-out gray-on-color is forbidden.

rules.name: The Tabular Money Rule
rules.body: Any number a seller compares — price, margin, ACoS, cashflow — uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so digits align vertically.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Bricolage for display and figures, DM Sans for everything else. No third font.

rules.name: The Quiet Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows are soft and wide, never hard and dark. Lift on hover by 1–2px, no more.

dos: Do keep amber (#d97706) as the single voice of emphasis — primary actions, active nav, focus rings, links. Rare by design.
Do use tabular-nums for every comparable figure (price, margin, ACoS, cashflow).
Do signal focus with the soft amber glow (0 0 0 4px rgba(217,119,6,.12)), and body-text contrast at ≥4.5:1.
Do lift cards and tiles 1–2px on hover with a wider, softer shadow — depth as a response to state.
Do put colored text on a tint of its own hue; reserve the status hues for data meaning.
Do offer guidance in place (.wika-help, .help-box) for newcomers without slowing pros down.
donts: Don't ship a generic SaaS dashboard look — no interchangeable blue-gradient admin template, no point-of-view-free chrome.
Don't build a cluttered enterprise tool — no Seller-Central walls of cryptic tables without hierarchy.
Don't go playful consumer app — no cartoonish illustration, emoji-first UI, or gamification around money and compliance.
Don't slide into cheap hustle/dropship aesthetics — no loud neon, hype badges, or get-rich-quick urgency.
Don't use a second accent to make something pop. If two elements are both amber, one is wrong.
Don't use hard black focus outlines or tight, dark 2014-style drop-shadows. Soft and wide, or nothing.
Don't set muted gray (#7e879b) as body text on a tinted near-white — bump toward ink.
